variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row for the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of goods sold' appears in the operating section. The visible D&A rows all belong to sales/distribution or administration, so nothing should be added separately to COGS.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not a clean standalone D&A expense. Also associated with SG&A sub-components already inside selected parent rows.
This appears to be a component nested under the selected parent row 'Administration costs', so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is the combination of 'Administration costs' and 'Sales and Distribution Costs'. The visible D&A rows appear as sub-components beneath those selected parent totals, not as separate same-level operating expense lines. To avoid double counting, no SG&A D&A row should be added separately.
